raw_cv_text:
Dimitri Okafor-Nikolaev
+44 20 7946 0958 | Email: dimitri.okafor@gmail.com | LinkedIn: dimitri-okafor-nikolaev | GitHub:
DmitriOkaforNikolaev | https://dimitriokafor.dev
EDUCATION
ETH Zurich (Swiss Federal Institute of Technology) | MSc Computer Science (Mobile 2017–
Systems & Distributed Computing) 2019
Thesis on real-time iOS networking optimization: reduced cold-start latency by 340ms across 50K+
concurrent connections using custom socket buffering—published in ACM MobiSys workshop
Dean's Honours (GPA 3.89/4.0); Chair of ETH Mobile Development Club—grew membership 240%
(45→108 members) and organized 3 hackathons with 180+ participants
University of Toronto | BASc Computer Engineering 2013–2017
Specialized in mobile & embedded systems; capstone: cross-platform Bluetooth LE framework
achieving 98.7% connection stability vs. 94.2% industry baseline
Cumulative GPA 3.82/4.0; recipient of Ontario Engineering Award; competed in ACM ICPC (Top 20
regionals)
EXPERIENCE
Stripe | Senior Mobile Engineer (iOS + React Native) 2021–Present
Led architecture redesign of Stripe's mobile SDK payment processing layer for iOS 14–18
compatibility; reduced transaction failure rate by 12% (2.8%→2.46%) across 500M+ annual
transactions and improved cold-start launch time by 280ms through lazy-loading and code stripping
Owned cross-platform React Native implementation for Stripe Payment Sheet; drove 34% increase in
mobile conversion rates (6.2%→8.3%) across 50K+ merchant partners, directly contributing ~$18M
incremental ARR
Mentored team of 6 junior iOS engineers; established mobile code review standards reducing critical
bugs by 67% (Q1: 22 issues → Q4: 7 issues); managed sprint velocity improvement from 45 to 78
story points over 8 quarters
Wise (formerly TransferWise) | Mobile Engineer (iOS Specialist) 2019–2021
Redesigned iOS app's real-time FX quote engine using reactive streams (RxSwift); cut UI update
latency by 420ms (650ms→230ms) and reduced battery drain by 31% in foreground usage through
optimized refresh intervals
Shipped multi-currency wallet feature (iOS + Android via Flutter bridge); achieved 89% adoption rate
(Day 30 DAU) among 3.2M iOS users; feature generated £4.7M in new cross-currency fees in first
year
Implemented on-device biometric authentication system supporting Face ID, Touch ID, and fallback
mechanisms; reduced authentication failure rates by 58% (8.3%→3.5%) and improved user NPS by
22 points in post-launch survey of 15K users
Figma | Mobile Engineer (Cross-Platform) 2019–2019
Developed Figma's first production iOS app prototype in Swift; optimized canvas rendering
achieving 60fps consistency across all iPhone models (XS, XR, 11) with average GPU memory
footprint of 186MB vs. 320MB initial implementation
Built real-time sync engine for collaborative editing using WebSocket + local SQLite; support for 50+
simultaneous remote cursors with <100ms propagation latency (measured via Chrome DevTools
frame capture analysis)
Wrote foundational iOS networking layer with automatic retry logic and exponential backoff; reduced
P99 request latency from 1850ms to 680ms and improved endpoint availability from 98.1% to 99.7%
during peak load testing (1K RPS)
Shopify | iOS Engineer 2017–2019
Built Shopify Point of Sale (POS) iOS app module for inventory sync; optimized database queries
reducing sync time from 12.3s to 2.1s for 50K SKU catalogs; impacted 85K+ retail stores globally
Shipped payment processing feature supporting 12 payment gateways; achieved 99.2% transaction
success rate and reduced average transaction processing time by 340ms through batching and pre-
authorization caching
Led iOS app accessibility audit and remediation; improved WCAG 2.1 AA compliance score from
61% to 94%; directly enabled 120K+ users with visual/motor impairments to access platform
PROJECTS
MotionSync | Swift, SwiftUI, CoreAnimation, Metal, Firebase 2020–2021
Open-source iOS animation library for synchronized multi-device interactions; 2,847 GitHub stars,
12.3K weekly downloads on CocoaPods; featured in Ray Wenderlich's 'Best iOS Libraries' (2021)
Benchmarked 140% faster frame render time vs. CABasicAnimation baseline through Metal-
accelerated interpolation; maintained 60fps across iPhone SE to iPhone 13 Pro with <8MB memory
overhead
PlatformBridge | Kotlin, Swift, C++, JNI, React Native 2020–Present
Cross-platform native module abstraction library enabling 60% code reuse between iOS and Android
codebases without sacrificing performance; 834 GitHub stars, adopted by 18 mid-market fintech
companies
Reduced inter-process communication (IPC) latency from 45ms to 8ms through custom C++
serialization layer; eliminated 3 major memory leak classes affecting long-running background
processes
CacheVault | Swift, SQLite, GRPC, Protobuf 2021–Present
Persistent caching framework for iOS with multi-tier eviction policy (LRU + LFU hybrid); 1,456
GitHub stars, 8.9K monthly downloads; 23% faster cold-start vs. standard Foundation URLCache
Implemented advanced compression using ZSTD codec achieving 73% size reduction for JSON
payloads; reduced cloud storage costs by $42K annually across 6 internal Stripe services processing
340B+ cache objects/month
EXTRACURRICULAR
React Native EU Conference | Conference Speaker & Workshop Organizer 2021–2023
Delivered keynote 'Building Production-Grade Cross-Platform Apps' (500+ attendees, 78K YouTube
views); workshop materials downloaded 34K+ times and cited in 12 open-source projects
Co-organized React Native performance optimization track attracting 180 engineers; post-conference
survey: 92% satisfaction rate and 68% reported implementing recommendations within 2 weeks
iOS.dev Community (Open Source Maintainer) | Core Contributor & Technical Mentor 2019–Present
Maintain 3 active Swift libraries with 50+ community pull requests reviewed annually; mentored 12
junior iOS engineers toward first open-source contribution—8 became regular contributors
Reduced issue resolution time from 14 days to 2.3 days through CI/CD automation and triage
guidelines; achieved 97% community satisfaction score (Net Promoter Score) in 2023 survey of 287
library users
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – Swift, Kotlin, JavaScript/TypeScript, Python, Objective-C, C++
Technologies – iOS (UIKit, SwiftUI), React Native, Flutter, Core Data, SQLite, WebSocket, GRPC,
GraphQL, Firebase, ARKit, CoreLocation, AVFoundation, Metal
Tools – Xcode, Android Studio, Git, Jira, Jenkins, GitHub Actions, Instruments, Figma, Proxyman,
Charles Proxy, App Annie analytics, LLDB debugger
name: Dimitri Okafor-Nikolaev

projects.subtitle: Kotlin, Swift, C++, JNI, React Native
